data.title: Trump Media Technology Group acquires 2% of CRO's circulating supply for approximately $10.5 million
data.description: Trump Media & Technology Group announced that it has completed its acquisition agreement with Crypto.com, purchasing 684.4 million Cronos (CRO) tokens at a price of approximately $0.153 per token for approximately $10.5 million. The transaction was completed in a 50% stock and 50% cash arrangement, representing approximately 2% of the current circulating supply of CRO. These tokens will reportedly be held in custody on Crypto.com's institutional-grade custody platform, Crypto.com Custody, and can be staked to generate additional returns. Both the CRO tokens and Trump Media & Technology Group shares exchanged in the transaction have lock-up periods (Globenewswire)

data.title: Bank of America Predicts Federal Reserve Rate Cuts in 2025
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Bank of America has revised its forecast for the Federal Reserve's monetary policy in 2025. The bank now anticipates that the Federal Reserve will implement two interest rate cuts during the year, a change from its previous expectation of no rate cuts. This adjustment reflects evolving economic conditions and the bank's assessment of future monetary policy trends.

data.title: Justin Sun Plans Significant Investment in U.S. Crypto Stocks
data.description: According to Foresight News, Sun Yuchen has expressed on social media his belief that U.S.-listed crypto-related stocks are undervalued. He announced plans to purchase $10 million worth of ALTS and WLFI each.

data.title: US SEC and CFTC Consider Introducing Perpetual Contracts to Promote Crypto and Blockchain Innovation
data.description: According to official documents, U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) Chairman Paul S. Atkins and Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) Acting Chair Caroline D. Pham issued a joint statement on September 5th, announcing that the two agencies will deepen regulatory collaboration to promote innovation in crypto assets and blockchain-related areas. The statement mentioned that regulators will explore the introduction of perpetual contracts in the U.S. market, enabling traders to participate in related products previously primarily available overseas on local platforms. Furthermore, the two sides plan to explore areas such as 24/7 markets, prediction markets, portfolio margin optimization, and DeFi innovation exemptions.

data.title: SharpLink says it fully complies with Nasdaq rules
data.description: Ethereum treasury company SharpLink stated on the X platform that it fully complies with Nasdaq regulations and no longer requires shareholder approval for its ATM financing program to acquire ETH. SharpLink emphasized that its strategy remains unchanged, raising capital only when it can create value for shareholders. It also pledged to strictly adhere to compliance and transparency requirements, ensuring all transactions comply with Nasdaq regulations and industry practices. This follows reports that Nasdaq is increasing its scrutiny of publicly listed companies that use margin trading to inflate their stock prices.

data.title: The US SEC and CFTC are strengthening their collaboration to promote regulatory coordination for crypto and derivatives.
data.description: According to crypto journalist Eleanor Terrett, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) are increasing their collaboration to support the development of crypto assets, DeFi, prediction markets, perpetual swaps, and portfolio margin. The two agencies plan to enhance the competitiveness of the U.S. market by harmonizing regulations, closing regulatory gaps, extending trading hours, and utilizing innovative exemptions. The two sides will hold a joint roundtable on September 29th to discuss next steps.

data.title: Hyperliquid announces native USDH stablecoin
data.description:
Hyperliquid announced plans for a native stablecoin, reserving the ticker USDH and starting a procedure to deploy the asset.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/hyperliquid-announces-usdh-stablecoin/

data.title: Nasdaq-listed CIMG and CoinP sign a memorandum of understanding (MOU) to jointly build a new RWA ecosystem
data.description: Nasdaq-listed CIMG (ticker: IMG) announced the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with cryptocurrency exchange CoinP.com, establishing a deep strategic partnership. The two parties will leverage CIMG's capital compliance resources with CoinP.com's Web 3 technology expertise to jointly explore the commercial application of Web 3 in areas such as RWA finance and US stock tokenization, accelerating the development of a global digital financial ecosystem. CoinP.com has pledged to purchase CIMG shares with 10% of future RWA ecosystem revenue, further deepening capital and business synergies between the two parties. This partnership marks CIMG's official entry into the RWA sector, injecting innovative momentum into its sustainable development strategy.

data.title: Wildcat Labs Completes $3.5 Million Seed Round Led by Robot Ventures
data.description: Wildcat Labs, the developer of the Wildcat lending protocol, announced the completion of a $3.5 million seed round led by Robot Ventures, with participation from Triton Capital, Polygon Ventures, Safe Foundation, Hyperithm, Hermeneutic Investments, Kronos Research, and several angel investors, including Fei Protocol founder Joey Santoro, Vyper core contributor Charles Cooper, and Ink founder Andrew Koller. This round values ​​the company at $35 million, with the funds to be used to open up the private lending market and bring it on-chain. (The Block)

data.title: ArkStream Capital Increases Investment in Ethena Labs by $10 Million
data.description: According to BlockBeats, ArkStream Capital has announced an additional investment of $10 million in Ethena Labs as of August 2025. This follows a previous investment of $5 million made in December 2024.

data.title: Binance Alpha to Launch MIRROR on September 8th
data.description: Binance Alpha announced that it will be listing Black Mirror (MIRROR) on September 8th. Eligible users can claim the airdrop using Alpha Points on the Alpha Events page after trading opens. Officials stated that further details will be announced later.

data.title: US labor market plunges again as unemployment surges to 4.3%
data.description:
The labor market slipped deeper into trouble in August. Only 22,000 jobs were added last month, way below the 75,000 economists expected. And unemployment shot up to 4. 3%, according to the Bureau of Labor Statistics. This slowdown piles on to earlier weak reports and makes a rate cut by the Fed almost a done deal […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-labor-market-plunges-again/

data.title: Belarus Develops Cryptocurrency Regulations Amid Industry Growth
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Belarusian President Aleksandr Lukashenko has directed lawmakers to establish clear and transparent regulations for the country's burgeoning cryptocurrency market. During a recent government conference, Lukashenko emphasized the importance of Belarus staying abreast of global trends in digital finance. He stated that the state's role is to define understandable rules and control mechanisms for this emerging sector, highlighting its novelty for Belarus.

Lukashenko referenced his previous directives from 2023, which aimed at comprehensive regulation of digital tokens and cryptocurrencies. This initiative was encapsulated in the Belarusian Presidential Decree No. 80, which sought to develop a national framework for cryptocurrency. The president underscored the necessity of delineating the responsibilities of government agencies and the government-supported IT special economic zone, Hi-Tech Park, within the crypto industry. His remarks follow earlier instructions to the energy minister to explore the potential of cryptocurrency mining, leveraging Belarus's surplus electricity.

Despite Belarus's apparent interest in cryptocurrency, the nation has shown resistance to its decentralized nature. In mid-2023, the Belarusian Ministry proposed legal amendments to restrict peer-to-peer cryptocurrency transactions, such as those involving Bitcoin. This intention was formalized last year when Lukashenko signed Decree No. 367, which prohibits individuals, including entrepreneurs residing in Hi-Tech Park, from engaging in cryptocurrency transactions outside Belarusian exchanges. The decree aims to maintain state oversight over digital assets, promoting a controlled and transparent circulation of digital tokens, primarily cryptocurrencies.

data.title: Non-farm payrolls confirm a weakening job market, setting the stage for a Fed rate cut this month
data.description: U.S. job growth slowed sharply in August, with the unemployment rate rising to 4.3%, confirming weakening labor market conditions and setting the stage for the Federal Reserve to cut interest rates this month. The U.S. Department of Labor's Bureau of Labor Statistics' employment report released Friday showed that nonfarm payrolls increased by only 22,000 in August, compared with expectations for a 75,000 increase and following an upwardly revised 79,000 increase in July. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. unemployment rate hit 4.3% in August
data.description: The U.S. unemployment rate was 4.3% in August, compared to 4.2% in the previous month and the expected 4.30%. (Jinshi)
